name: Errawarra Resources Ltd
summary: Errawarra Resources Ltd engages in the exploration of gold, nickel, and copper properties in Australia. The company holds interests in Binti Binti gold project located 70km north-east of Kalgoorlie; and 80% interest in Gindalbie goldfield project located 75 kilometres north-northeast of Kalgoorlie, Western Australia. It also holds interests in Errabiddy project located 200km north-west of Meekatharra, Western Australia and Fraser Range project located 100km east of Norseman, Western Australia. Errawarra Resources Ltd was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Perth, Australia.
